action.reasoning: Observation: v7=0.6426 (new best). Weak on squirrel(0.24), bobcat(0.39), bird(0.50). ~47min left, 11 iters. Analysis: Need to boost rare class accuracy. Decision: Train v8 with 6 unfrozen DINOv2 layers, stronger augmentation, and try test-time calibration in predict.py to account for known test distribution skew.
